assertions.title: Page loads, URL param pre-fills input, auto-runs check

steps.observed: Page loaded successfully (200) but shows sign-in prompt for unauthenticated user
Clerk development mode sign-in modal appeared with email/password fields and 'Continue with Google' button

steps.action: Click 'Sign up' link to create test account
steps.observed: Sign-up form displayed with email, password fields

steps.action: Fill email (minh@example.com) and password, click Continue
steps.expected: Account created, redirected to fallback page with auth
steps.observed: Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA appeared and hung (error 300030). Sign-up request failed with 400 status.
Clerk returned 'Couldn't find your account' - no existing test user in development instance

evidence.consoleErrors: Cloudflare Turnstile Error 300030; Turnstile Widget hung; Clerk sign-up request failed 400; 'Couldn't find your account' on sign-in attempt

assertions.issues: Cannot authenticate via agent-browser: Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA blocks automated sign-up in Clerk keyless/development mode, and no pre-existing test user account exists for sign-in. URL parameter IS preserved in address bar (verified: http://localhost:3000/extension/check?url=https%3A%2F%2Fjobs.nutrien.com%2FNutrien%2Fjob%2FLoveland-CO%2F30186-en_US). Page correctly shows sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users. Cannot verify URL pre-fill in input, auto-check behavior, or results display without authenticated session.

assertions.title: Displays match status, parsed job info, and application history

steps.action: Navigate to fallback page with URL param
Attempt authentication via Clerk development mode
steps.observed: Authentication blocked by Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA. Cannot reach authenticated state to verify check results.

evidence.consoleErrors: Same as VAL-FALLBACK-001 - Turnstile CAPTCHA blocking auth

assertions.issues: Blocked by same authentication issue as VAL-FALLBACK-001. Cannot verify status badge, parsed fields, or application entries without completing sign-in. The ExtensionJobChecker component (which renders these elements) is only rendered for authenticated, allowlisted users (verified via page source code review).

assertions.title: Mark-applied action available from fallback page

steps.action: Navigate to fallback page with URL param
Attempt authentication via Clerk development mode
steps.observed: Authentication blocked by Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA. Cannot reach authenticated state to verify mark-applied control.

evidence.consoleErrors: Same as VAL-FALLBACK-001 - Turnstile CAPTCHA blocking auth

assertions.issues: Blocked by same authentication issue as VAL-FALLBACK-001. Cannot verify mark-applied button presence without authenticated session. The mark-applied action would be rendered by the ExtensionJobChecker component, which requires auth.

blockers.description: Clerk development/keyless mode authentication is blocked by Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA in headless browser. The Turnstile widget detects the automated browser environment, returns error 300030, and hangs indefinitely. Sign-up fails with HTTP 400 because the CAPTCHA token is never generated. Additionally, no pre-existing test user account exists in the Clerk development instance, so sign-in also fails ('Couldn't find your account'). This blocks all assertions requiring authenticated state (VAL-FALLBACK-001, VAL-FALLBACK-003, VAL-FALLBACK-004).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried sign-up with minh@example.com/TestPassword123! (CAPTCHA blocked). Tried sign-in with same credentials (no account found). Tried clicking CAPTCHA checkbox at coordinates (timed out). Verified the page loads correctly and URL parameter is preserved.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 3 blocked. All assertions require Clerk authentication which is blocked by Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA in the automated browser environment. The fallback page correctly loads, shows the sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users, and preserves the URL parameter in the address bar. The Clerk sign-in/sign-up modal renders correctly in development mode but the Turnstile bot detection prevents completing authentication.
